text:
A motor vehicle shall be equipped with:

(1) front safety belts if safety belt anchorages were part of the manufacturer’s original equipment on the vehicle; or

(2) for a motor vehicle that is an assembled vehicle, as defined by Section 731.001 (Definitions) , front safety belts in vehicles that contain safety belt anchorages.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.601 — Safety Belts Required

A motor vehicle shall be equipped with:

    (1) front safety belts if safety belt anchorages were part of the manufacturer’s original equipment on the vehicle; or

    (2) for a motor vehicle that is an assembled vehicle, as defined by Section 731.001 (Definitions) , front safety belts in vehicles that contain safety belt anchorages.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 10, eff. January 1, 2025.*

subsections.text: A motor vehicle shall be equipped with:
front safety belts if safety belt anchorages were part of the manufacturer’s original equipment on the vehicle; or
for a motor vehicle that is an assembled vehicle, as defined by Section 731.001 (Definitions) , front safety belts in vehicles that contain safety belt anchorages.
